prestazioni: Engine swap to a turbocharged **EF-DEM** (660cc, 12-valve, DOHC, 64PS stock) with a **HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit** (8psi boost, 120PS target) paired with a **TODA Racing EF-series forged crankshaft** (78mm stroke) and **JE Pistons 83mm forged slugs** (8.5:1 compression for forced induction).

Full **Spoon Sports EF-series billet camshafts** (272° intake/280° exhaust duration, 11.0mm lift) with **Tomei adjustable cam gears** and a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 400x150x76mm core) to eliminate heat soak under sustained boost.

Custom **HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 header** (1.5-inch primaries, 2.5-inch collector) mated to a **Fujitsubo Giken AXF01 cat-back exhaust** (50mm piping, titanium tips) with a **SARD 60mm electronic boost controller** and **Apexi Power FC** standalone ECU (EF-DEM specific map, 10,000 RPM limit).
estetica: **C-One Mira TR-XX Widebody Kit** (FRP construction, 30mm extended fenders, OEM+ fitment) with **Volk Racing TE37SL 14x6.5 +38** wheels (185/55R14 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires) and **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (30-way damping, 50mm drop).

**Vertex Lang II front bumper** (carbon fiber lip, integrated tow hooks) with a **Seibon Carbon TR-XX roof** (2.5kg weight reduction) and **TRD-style rear spoiler** (polyurethane, 30mm adjustable angle).

**Recaro SRD-E bucket seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved, 6-point Takata harnesses) wrapped in **Alcantara/Suede (Momo Red stitching)** with a **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** (14mm thick, perforated leather) and **Defi BF gauges** (boost, oil temp, wideband AFR) mounted in a **Custom C-One A-pillar pod**.
